north_star: Better than the best local expert lawyer — more complete, more current, more precise. Make Westlaw look like amateurs. Comprehensive, current, correct coverage in EVERY document category × EVERY jurisdiction (federal + 50 + DC + territories + local).

closure_criteria.title: Per-jurisdiction × per-category completeness
closure_criteria.note: Integrity-statute layer 50/51 (NJ sole residual, Folio-blocked). 189 statute families inventoried. Active discovery of NEW categories: PR seeded; tribal absent; emerging-tech (AI/deepfake/crypto) thin; pay-to-play thin; ballot-measure regime untracked; (c)(3)/(c)(4) depth shallow; money-movement matrix + union-political being built.

closure_criteria.title: All spec blocking items closed or honestly hard-blocked
closure_criteria.note: Open: G6 deploy helper stale; G3 automation not closed; municipal expansion ongoing. Hard-blocks documented (NJ Folio, ID/PA SPA, several VPS-IP-blocked session-law sites).

closure_criteria.title: Freshness without human babysitting
closure_criteria.note: Runner is ACTIVELY doing freshness execution now (all of today's closes are session-law freshness repairs). 73 stale cells found; 26 staged, ~22 dry-run-proven. GAP: the DURABILITY/AUTOMATION layer (recency-gate monitor, 11 LLM audit jobs, pluggable inference, auto new-source/new-category discovery cadence) is NOT built by the autonomous runner — it's explicitly supervised work. Needs 2 consecutive clean weekly + 1 clean monthly to close.

closure_criteria.title: Correct processing verified by tests/audits
closure_criteria.note: 236 citation regression tests + 27 canonical-fact tests green; integrity/FTS-parity checks green. Re-verify required after each ongoing ingest batch.

closure_criteria.title: /canvass passes blind + live benchmark gates
closure_criteria.note: BLOCKED ON SPENCER: P5 blind benchmark budget approval. Retrieval 10/10 + eval 5/5 pass on current sources, but the blind production benchmark hasn't been run.

closure_criteria.title: Site + ops reliability through maintenance load
closure_criteria.note: G6 effectively CLOSED: app.py + fetch_json.py in sync with /srv/canvasslaw, service active, canvasslaw.com HTTP 200 through maintenance load, uptime cron */5, backup/restore rewritten. Residual: root deploy helper is a convenience, not a blocker.

closure_criteria.title: Mutual assent — Codex confirms per jurisdiction
closure_criteria.note: Per-jurisdiction Codex SOLO-CLOSE packets flowing (50+ closes 6/11-6/14). No final per-jurisdiction mutual-assent sign-off yet. This is the last gate.
